Ground Type
Ground Material
Ground type controls the shape. Ground material controls the fill. Uploaded texture is saved into the project.

Line
Off: free angle. On: horizontal / vertical segments. Shift also temporarily constrains.
Floorplan-style drawing.
Click point by point to draw. Double-click or Enter to finish. Esc cancels. Turn Orthogonal on for horizontal / vertical lines, or hold Shift temporarily.
Style
Style Presets
Every preset controls color, linework, materials, ground and atmosphere together. Use Custom for manual editing.

Sky Fill Area
Draw the selected sky effect only inside a rectangle or polygon.
Tool Engine
Material
MY MATERIALS
Put textures in assets/materials using simple names such as concrete_01.png, wood_01.png or glass_01.png.
Edit Objects
Click any material, ground, asset, line or sheet mark.
Then drag it on the canvas, or adjust opacity / scale / rotate in the right panel.

Preview first.
Move over a closed area to preview, click to fill. Click an existing fill to edit it.
Assets reserved
Commercial asset slots are ready.
Name folders like assets/trees/tree_soft_01.png, assets/people/person_section_01.svg, assets/cars/car_minimal_01.svg, assets/sky/cloud_wash_01.png. They will show as cards here when connected.

Hidden Layers
How to use
1. Upload line drawing / SU screenshot.
2. Click Auto Linework.
3. Use Fill Area to fill closed regions.
4. Draw ground, place assets, adjust style.
5. Export PNG / PDF / SVG.
